stemHtml:
What should be considered when using the following NOTAM information from the transmitter during the validity period?

Q EDWW/QNDAS/IV/BO/AE/000/999/5233N01317E025
A EDDT
B FROM: 16/01/08 08:46
C TO: 16/01/29 12:00
E BERLIN TEGEL DVOR/DME TGL 112.30/CH70X DME PART OUT OF SERVICE.

options.b: The DME information will be available on CH70Y.
options.c: The DME information will only be available on 112.30 MHz.
